title: [MTR4] Low Effort NIR Class 3000 & 4000
description: Low Effort NIR Class 3000 & 4000 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low effort NIR Class 3000 & 4000
NIR Class 3000 & 4000 from retextured M-Train from base mod.
# Version 3 is out NOW!
![NIR Class 3000 passing by NIR Class 4000, showing the new and improved models for Version 3 and text saying "NIR Class 3000/4000 - The model update" "OUT NOW!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4a5de04afce9489562e4e3ba44411909616d5d7.png)
## Liveries
- Translink (C3K)
- Translink (C4K)
## Features
- The trains
- New original motor sounds
- Customised interior seats
